vocab.meaning: sự phù phiếm/điệu đà là không có giới hạn
vocab.example: I don't carry a mirror, but for some of my friends, their vanity knows no bounds and they have one in every bag.

vocab.meaning: trông phù hợp với hoàn cảnh/vị trí
vocab.example: I keep a small mirror in my briefcase to ensure I look the part before walking into a high-stakes meeting.

vocab.meaning: đầu tóc rối bời/không chỉnh chu
vocab.example: I'm a bit of a perfectionist, so I carry a mirror to make sure there isn't a hair out of place.

vocab.meaning: lệ thuộc vào thời trang/vẻ bề ngoài
vocab.example: I’m not exactly a slave to fashion, so carrying a mirror with me at all times feels like a bit much.

vocab.meaning: chỉnh trang/làm đẹp lại cho bản thân
vocab.example: It's quite handy to have a mirror in your pocket when you need to quickly spruce yourself up after a commute.
On a windy day, a portable mirror is worth its weight in gold for fixing your hair before a photo.
I don't usually need it, but I keep a compact mirror in my glove box just to be on the safe side.

vocab.meaning: làm qua loa/đốt cháy giai đoạn
vocab.example: I never cut corners with my appearance, which is why a travel mirror is a non-negotiable item in my bag.

vocab.meaning: mắt thường (không có công cụ hỗ trợ)
vocab.example: Some imperfections are hard to spot with the naked eye, so a magnifying travel mirror is essential for me.

vocab.meaning: từ hư vô (xuất hiện bất ngờ)
vocab.example: I wish I could just produce a mirror out of thin air whenever I feel like my makeup is smudging.
